payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Close-up partial view of a white ceiling fan showing a round central motor housing with three broad white blades; blades and housing are edge-cropped by the image border, exhibit soft shadows and slight blur, and appear to be photographed at close range (~0.8 m).
